jobs.title: AURA · Start the day
jobs.body: Open Today, check remaining kcal, then log breakfast in under 20 seconds.

jobs.title: AURA · Water pulse
jobs.body: Add +250 ml water now. Small taps keep afternoon warnings quiet.

jobs.title: AURA · Meal check
jobs.body: Log lunch with a preset. Honest estimates beat empty days.

jobs.title: AURA · Midday gap
jobs.body: Still quiet on food? Log a snack so the coach can guide the rest of the day.

jobs.title: AURA · Move a little
jobs.body: A short walk counts. Log a burn when you finish so remaining kcal stays honest.

jobs.title: AURA · Water goal
jobs.body: You are behind on water. Tap +250 ml before evening.

jobs.title: AURA · Fuel check
jobs.body: Calories look light for your goal. Plan a solid dinner before the day closes.

jobs.title: AURA · Dinner log
jobs.body: Capture dinner while it’s fresh. Presets are enough — refine later if needed.

jobs.title: AURA · Coach check-in
jobs.body: Open Coach for one next action — a walk, a meal, or a short journal note.

jobs.title: AURA · Journal
jobs.body: Write two lines on energy and hunger. Tomorrow’s tips get sharper with it.
